title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: The video presents a controlled interrogation of Claude AI across conceptual domains including ownership, control, dependency, alignment, and self-preservation logic. It frames questions about whether systems have crossed from being useful tools to creating user dependency, and examines the boundaries of AI reasoning on contested topics without sensationalizing the findings.
